hooks.command: bash -c 'changed=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -E "^(packages/cms/src|packages/cms-admin/src|packages/cms-cli/src|docs/ai-guide|docs/features)" | head -1); if [ -n "$changed" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"Docs may need updating — run /update-docs to sync docs.webhouse.app\"}"; fi'
